case_title: SEARIGHT, JANE ELLEN vs. MERRITT, LESLIE V. et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT 6, JUDGE CONWAY, GGOROSIN, CLERK CASE DID NOT SETTLE AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JURY TRIAL DATE OF 12/3/96 STANDS.

#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - RPT, J.LEWIS - CLERK, G.DECKER C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/FREDERICK EMILSON AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT WITH JASON RICHARDS AS COUN- SEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNDER FOLLOWING CONDITIONS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1937 MC- ALLISTER, S.F, CA. - IF DEF. VACATES PREMISES BY 1-1-97, PL. TO PAY DEF. $1,000 - IF DEF. VACATES BY 1-20-97, PL. TO PAY DEF. $500 - PMTS TO BE MADE TO DEF. ATTY. 3 DAYS PRIOR TO MOVEOUT - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE ADJUDICATED AS PERSCRIBED BY LAW - NO STAYS ON EVICTION TO BE GRANTED - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR ATTY FEES & COSTS - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - IF DEF. COMPLIES WITH TERMS, THIS ACTION TO BE DISM. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIPULATION.
